check_different_salts_different_hashes(u.notice: Two orders with different salts must produce different struct hashes.

check_domain_separator_deterministic().notice: domainSeparator() must always return the same value.

check_ecrecover_returns_signer(bytes32,u.notice: For any valid signature, ecrecover must return the signer.
